creator: hrs@FreeBSD.org
text: I did not notice it but ck_ht_* APIs in concurrencykit were intentionally  disabled on 32-bit platforms.  I added ONLY_FOR_ARCHS to textproc/turboxsl as workaround.  While I am not sure how many packages depend on libck and use ck_ht APIs, if any, they need a similar workaround on i386 build at this moment.
